title: Fluffy Turkish Cheese Flatbread with Blackcurrant Jam
description: A light, airy flatbread studded with crumbled feta and dill, topped with sweet blackcurrant jam for a surprising umami twist.
instructions: Dissolve yeast and sugar in warm water; let sit for 5–10 minutes until foamy.
In a large bowl, combine flour, low‑sodium salt, olive oil, milk, yogurt, and the activated yeast mixture; knead until a smooth, elastic dough forms.
Cover the dough, let it rise in a warm place for 60 minutes or until doubled in size.
Add the softened butter, crumbled feta, and dill to the dough; knead until the butter is fully incorporated and the dough remains fluffy.
Divide the dough into four equal portions; roll each into a 15 cm diameter disc.
Preheat the oven to 220 °C (428 °F) with a baking stone or sheet inside.
Place the discs on parchment paper, brush lightly with olive oil, and bake for 12–15 minutes until puffed and golden.
Remove from oven, spread 15 g of blackcurrant jam on one side of each flatbread, drizzle with a splash of olive oil, and serve warm.
